name: ICICI Bank Sapphiro RuPay Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under ICICI Bank reward programme terms
milestoneBenefits: Welcome vouchers worth Rs 9,000+ listed on ICICI Bank card catalogue
Up to 20,000 reward points every anniversary year under ICICI Bank milestone rewards
additionalBenefits: Complimentary access to domestic and international airport lounges
Buy one ticket and get up to Rs 500 off on the second ticket twice every month on BookMyShow
Golf course privileges and dining benefits
RuPay network support for UPI linking

salaried: Age 21 years and above, monthly income Rs 75,000 and above
selfEmployed: Age 21 years and above, eligibility is subject to ICICI Bank approval criteria
